description: Universal 'coderef map <path>' command working on ANY repo: scans if .coderef/ absent, projects graph.json+index.json to a file-level map/data.json, emits bundled interactive browser viewer (static graph.html default + --serve local server for big repos) with dependency graph, search, node-detail panel, hotspots/cycles/impact overlays; agent parity in v1 (/coderef-map skill + MCP map tool). V2 enrichments: graph analytics (communities/centrality/coupling/dead-code), per-edge evidence, declared-vs-detected drift. Ruled plan at coderef/working/coderef-core/graphify-alignment-projections/PLAN.md
